case_title: MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP VS. LYNN E CLIPPER et al

docket_entries.description: CRC 3.740 REVIEW. (212)
CRC 3.740 REVIEW. (212)

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FIRST SET OF INTERROGATORIES; ORDER DEEMING ADMISSIONS ADMITTED AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF TO RECOVER $265.00 AS REASONABLE SANCTIONS. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP'S MOTION FOR ORDER IMPOSING TERMINATING SANCTION AND REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE A PROOF OF SERVICE OR COURTESY COPY PER SF LOCAL RULE 2.6B. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; NOT REPORTED

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP'S MOTION FOR ORDER IMPOSING TERMINATING SANCTION AND REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF MAY ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT TO PAY $240 IN SANCTIONS TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2011 Continued To Aug-05-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice And Motion For Order Imposing Terminating Sanction And Request For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-23-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP'S MOTION FOR ORDER IMPOSING TERMINATING SANCTION AND REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion for terminating sanctions granted, no opposition filed. Plaintiff may enter default judgment against defendant. Defendant to pay $240 in sanctions to plaintiff within 10 days of notice of entry of this order. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

Notice And Motion For Order Imposing Terminating Sanction And Requestfor Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-18-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP'S MOTION FOR ORDER IMPOSING TERMINATING SANCTION AND REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - OFF CALENDAR, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE A PROOF OF SERVICE OR COURTESY COPY PER SF LOCAL RULE 2.6B. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

Ntc Of Mtn For Order Compelling Response To Pltf'S Req. For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Interrogatories; Order Deeming Admissions Admitted And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP's Motion For Order Compelling Response To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Interrogatories; Order Deeming Admissions Admitted And For Sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff to recover $265.00 as reasonable sanctions. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. JUDGE CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, NOT REPORTED (CWW/302)
